# BasejumpQDN™
[Ultra-secure key exchange capabilities  
that deliver long-term enterprise cybersecurity — today.](https://www.evolutionq.com/products/basejumpqdn)
[BasejumpQDN Datasheet](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/69b1efcfc453865e93fcd172_00738D_eQ-BasejumpQDN-Overview_v02.pdf)[Basejump SEN-500 Datasheet](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/69b1efd020b449d224500605_00709D_eQ-BasejumpSEN500_v09.pdf)
![BasejumpQDN](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/63f588e8232505ba4c1eda84_BasejumpQDN.webp)
### **The clock is ticking**
[Enterprises in critical industries are up against a double deadline. ](https://www.evolutionq.com/products/basejumpqdn)On the one hand, they need to modernize their cryptographic approaches to defend against evolving cyber threats including known quantum threats. On the other, they urgently need the agility and resilience to harness the power of quantum, AI and other advanced computing technologies for their own protection.   
  
BasejumpQDN™, part of the Basejump™ platform from evolutionQ, is a complete key exchange solution that draws on the highly secure capabilities of evolving quantum networks. And it’s not theoretical: BasejumpQDN is in deployment today. 
![BasejumpQDN - protection against the quantum threat](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/643f111a07baa8031c856fed_BasejumpQDN.webp)
### **A simple, scalable approach**
Find out how we turn quantum networks into simplified solutions  
for enhanced cryptographic resilience.
[Schedule a product introduction](https://www.evolutionq.com/products/schedule)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/643f151791c34777c232db17_quantum-computing-technology.jpg)
### **Take quantum security farther with BasejumpQDN**
Quantum links over optical fibre are currently limited to a few hundred kilometers. With BasejumpQDN, you can extend today’s quantum key exchange networks using trusted, certified repeater nodes, and seamlessly upgrade to zero-trust quantum repeater nodes as they become commercially available. These future nodes do not require physical security or certification, reducing costs and enabling deployment in locations where strong physical protections would be difficult or expensive.
### **Avoid vendor lock-in**
BasejumpQDN lets you grow your quantum-safe network capabilities over time and allows you to build in emerging innovations and cost savings as technologies mature. Because BasejumpQDN is vendor-neutral, you have the freedom to incorporate devices from multiple vendors, preventing vendor lock-in.
![QKD Device](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/643f151785eba77c765d1a92_QKD-Device-Vendor-Lock-in.jpg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/643f158a8341be826bc6f8dc_evolutionq-quantum-computing-technology.webp)
### **Intelligent key routing**
BasejumpQDN provides keys where and when they’re required while optimizing network availability for maximum reliability and minimal network disruptions. The intelligence built into the BasejumpQDN approach delivers efficiencies that improve reliability while reducing hardware costs by minimizing the number of paired devices needed to meet demand.
### **Monitor your network with our BasejumpQDN dashboard**
Key usage by external applications
Virtual QKD key-swap throughput
QNL key-swap pool state
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/6643e95866980947deed6a53_evolutionQ-BasejumpQDN-dashboard2.png)
Keys available to external applications
Virtual QKD key-swap latency
Physical QKD buffered key levels
### **Simulate quantum key exchange with BasejumpSIM™**
Want to know how utilizing a quantum key exchange network will impact your IT environment, how much quantum key capacity your network would require, or what will happen if a quantum device slows down or fails? Find out by simulating the key exchange network in the cloud with BasejumpSIM.  
  
You can model quantum key exchange devices running over fibre, satellite links, different network topologies and traffic scenarios to see how an actual network might behave in your real operational environment. Identify opportunities to get your network performing better, faster and at higher capacity before installing physical devices or expanding your current deployment.   
  
We can also help you quickly build a quantum-safe demonstration network using your existing quantum key exchange devices in BasejumpQDN to test out application use cases without incurring major capital costs.
![a software developer is presenting a quantum safe network](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63e68dd55d1e0e13004da649/643f15cb9e0364f9a3b673cf_quantum-safe-demonstration-network.webp)
evolutionQ
